description: SettleMint: Last 2 Months — Product, Marketing, Business review for executive team

slides.title: Product
slides.subtitle: Platform releases, compliance modules, and the office agent system

slides.title: Platform Tooling Released
slides.col1:
**DALP CLI**
• Experimental release enabling developer automation of platform operations from the command line
• Scripted deployment, asset configuration, and token lifecycle management without portal interaction
• Reduces setup and iteration time for development teams building on DALP
• Designed as the primary interface for CI/CD pipeline integration
• Shipped alongside SDK to give developers a complete programmatic toolset
slides.col2:
**DALP SDK**
• Experimental release enabling programmatic access to all DALP platform APIs and event streams
• Supports custom connector development, workflow automation, and third-party system integration
• Targets engineering teams embedding DALP capabilities inside existing financial infrastructure
• Covers asset issuance, compliance enforcement, and settlement event subscription
• Allows builders to compose DALP functions without relying on the platform portal

slides.title: Demo & Compliance in Production
slides.item1:
**Neptune Demo Live**
Full Neptune demo environment is operational with the NMLHANDY token deployed end to end. Prospects can see a real tokenization workflow running on live infrastructure, not slides.
slides.item2:
**Country Allow Module**
Restricts token transfers and investor participation by jurisdiction. Geographic compliance rules are enforced at the ledger layer, removing the need for manual eligibility checks.
slides.item3:
**Identity and Investor Controls**
Identity-verification module gates participation on confirmed KYC status. Investor-count module enforces hard limits on the number of token holders per issuance.
slides.item4:
**Transfer Approval Module**
Adds an explicit governance sign-off layer before any token movement is finalized on-chain. Every transfer is held in a pending state until an authorized approver confirms it.

slides.title: Office Agent System Built
slides.item1:
**Six Production Agents**
Bid manager, PPT maker, PPT checker, RFP forge, bid checker, and press manager are live. Each agent operates within a defined scope with its own workflow, instructions, and output standard.
slides.item2:
**69 Files and 130K+ Words**
The system spans 69 source files and over 130,000 words of structured content, skills, prompt scaffolding, and process documentation. It is the largest internal knowledge infrastructure SettleMint has built.
slides.item3:
**Document Automation at Scale**
Proposal generation, RFI responses, bid qualification, and press content are handled by the agents. What took days now takes minutes, with consistent structure and brand voice throughout.
slides.item4:
**Built-In Quality Validation**
Checker agents run automated quality validation against SettleMint standards before any output is delivered. Nothing leaves the system without being reviewed against defined acceptance criteria.

slides.title: Marketing
slides.subtitle: Brand positioning, content systems, and competitive intelligence

slides.title: Brand and Positioning
slides.col1:
**Complexity of Doing It Right**
• New positioning frames SettleMint around execution depth
• Fragmented stacks are a seller problem, not a buyer problem
• SettleMint removes that burden by consolidating the stack
• Resonates with sophisticated enterprise buyers who have tried and failed
slides.col2:
**Figtree Standardized**
• Figtree adopted as the single brand font across all materials
• 35+ files swept and updated for typographic consistency
• Design system locked, documented, and enforced in every output
• Eliminates font drift and off-brand presentation artifacts
slides.col3:
**Messaging Architecture Updated**
• Core message hierarchy defined for executive and technical audiences
• Buyer-facing language restructured around outcomes, not platform features
• Competitive framing updated to reflect current market positioning
• Consistent voice applied across proposals, web, and sales materials

slides.title: Content and Social Capability
slides.col1:
**LinkedIn Post Skill**
• Structured skill generating on-brand LinkedIn posts at speed
• Covers executive voice, product updates, and thought leadership formats
• Reduces drafting time from 30 minutes to under five minutes per post
• Integrated into the content workflow for rapid social publishing
slides.col2:
**Release Scanner Cron**
• Automated cron monitors product and ecosystem releases continuously
• Feeds the content pipeline with timely, factual update material
• Ensures marketing reacts to releases within hours rather than days
• Removes manual monitoring as a bottleneck in the content process
slides.col3:
**Competitive and SWIFT Intel**
• Competitor intelligence coverage built into the content workflow
• SWIFT interview preparation material produced and structured
• Ongoing market signal capture embedded in the content system
• Intelligence feeds directly into positioning updates and proposal language

slides.title: Business
slides.subtitle: RFI wins, partnerships, proposals, and pipeline health

slides.title: RFI Wins: Three Mandates
slides.body: Three strategic RFI responses delivered and accepted across post-trade, digital assets, and real estate tokenization

slides.title: Key Partnerships Progressed
slides.col1:
**aXedras + BIL: DALP Tokenization**
• aXedras partnership confirmed with BIL as the issuing institution
• DALP selected as the tokenization platform for the joint initiative
• Precious metals tokenization use case in active scoping with defined asset parameters
• Joint go-to-market approach in development with shared commercial model
• Represents SettleMint's first precious metals tokenization partnership in production scope
slides.col2:
**CMA / DEPO-X: Bond Tokenization POC**
• Technical specification review completed: 835 lines assessed and mapped to DALP capabilities
• SettleMint confirmed as the platform for bond tokenization in the POC scope
• 4-week proof-of-concept timeline defined and agreed with the counterparty
• Covers issuance, compliance, settlement, and investor lifecycle management
• Execution timeline locked pending regulatory and organizational approvals

slides.title: Proposals Delivered
slides.col1:
**BIS Project Kairos**
• Proposal submitted to the Bank for International Settlements
• Framed exclusively on EVM stack: Besu and Ethereum
• Positions SettleMint as infrastructure for cross-border settlement
• Demonstrates regulatory-grade compliance and settlement finality
slides.col2:
**Neptune / NML**
• Full proposal delivered for Neptune Leasing and NML
• Aligned to the live Neptune demo environment already operational
• NMLHANDY token used as the reference asset throughout the proposal
• Combines product evidence with commercial terms in a single package
slides.col3:
**NDAX Contract**
• NDAX contract proposal finalized and submitted to the client
• EVM-only framing applied consistently with other active proposals
• Covers technical architecture, compliance approach, and commercial terms
• Part of a coordinated EVM positioning strategy across all open proposals

slides.title: Pipeline Health and Governance
slides.item1:
**CRM Cleaned and Focused**
Over 200 zombie deals removed from the pipeline. The 15 to 20 live, qualified opportunities are preserved with clear owners, defined next steps, and realistic close dates.
slides.item2:
**Board Reporting Cadence**
Matthew established a regular board reporting rhythm. Executive-level pipeline visibility is now delivered on a consistent cadence, replacing ad hoc updates with structured review.
slides.item3:
**MEDDPICC as Differentiator**
MEDDPICC qualification adopted as the commercial discipline across the sales team. It distinguishes serious opportunities from noise and gives leadership confidence in the numbers.
slides.item4:
**Live Deal Concentration**
Sales energy is concentrated on the active deal set. Each qualified opportunity has a named owner, agreed next action, and an expected close date tied to the board cadence.
